title: ficus mysorensis var. dasycarpa
intro: Ficus mysorensis var. dasycarpa, also known as the Indian banyan, is a plant species that belongs to the family Moraceae. Traditionally, the plant is used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ficus mysorensis var. dasycarpa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of fever and cough. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and powders that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
